calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Appellant/Deft. Thomas Iveli (co-owner) for Norcal Holdings LLC (property mgmt.) is present.
Respondents/Plaintiffs Matthew Haulk and Teresita Sablan also present.
Respondent/Plaintiff Zach Blume is not present.

The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Matthew Haulk testifies on behalf of respondents/plaintiffs. The following documentary evidence is introduced: #1 - Lease #2 - Notice to Vacate #3 - Walk-Thru Letter #4 - Letter re 21-day Statutory Period #5 - Deposit Check & Itemized Deductions #6 - Demand Letter
#7 - Second Itemized Deductions #8 - Filing Fees - Complaint & POS #10 - Timeline
#11 - Article #12 - Sablan Declaration #13A-B - Photos

Thomas Iveli testifies on behalf of appellant/deft. The following documentary evidence is introduced: #A - Photo #B - Summary #C - Grant Deed #D - Norcal Holdings LLC packet of documents #E - 8/6/08 Termination Letter #F - Calendar #G - Rental Agmt & Addendums
#H - Copy of Claim

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported (Dept 318)
